title: [Snyk Code] Path Traversal
description:
## Path Traversal

**Project:** `AnthusAI/Virtuus`
**File:** `tools/check_ec2_params.py`
**Location:** line 29, column 12 to line 29, column 16
**Classes:** CWE-CWE-23
### Snippet (tools/check_ec2_params.py:27-31)
```

  28 | 
  29 |     path = Path(args.params)
  30 |     data = json.loads(path.read_text())
  31 |     missing = [k for k in REQUIRED_KEYS if not data.get(k)]
```

**Issue Key:** bb90bacc-f44c-4095-8426-c65cf6dfb9f7

### Details
Path Traversal

**Fix:** Review and remediate in code.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Current stance: dismiss. Path(args.params).read_text() reads a developer-specified local JSON file passed via --params CLI flag. This is an internal developer validation tool with no web-facing attack surface. The developer controls the path entirely. Pending triple-check before formal dismissal.
